mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.name AS userName, SUM(p.total) AS totalSpent FROM purchases p INNER JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id GROUP BY u.id, u.name ORDER BY totalSpent DESC

SELECT pr.id AS productId, pr.name AS productName, SUM(pi.quantity) AS totalQuantity FROM purchase_items pi INNER JOIN products pr ON pi.product_id = pr.id GROUP BY pr.id, pr.name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC
